title: lycium vulgare
intro: Lycium vulgare, also known as Chinese boxthorn, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the nightshade family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Lycium vulgare include improving vision, reducing fatigue, and enhancing immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Lycium vulgare can be prepared in various forms, including dried fruit, tea, and capsules, allowing for flexibility in its use as a dietary supplement.
